summary: Comprehensive testing of Reservation Import Engine production-grade implementation. All 25 backend unit tests pass. All 15 API endpoint tests pass. Frontend Reservations tab fully functional with all 5 sub-sections working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All reservation import API endpoints working: /stats, /imported, /review-queue, /batches, /audit-trail, /retry-acks
Stats endpoint returns proper structure with by_status, by_ack_status, review_queue_count, ack_failed_count, recent_batches, success_rate
Retry-acks endpoint properly validates connector_id and returns 400 for missing connector
Frontend Reservations tab is 2nd tab in Admin Control Panel at /app/admin-control-panel
Overview section shows 4 metric cards: Total Imports, Success Rate, Review Queue, ACK Failed
5 sub-sections properly implemented: Overview, Reservations, Review, Batches, Audit
Reservations list shows table with correct columns: Guest, Channel, Status, ACK, Dates, Amount, Actions
Review queue shows empty state message 'No items pending review'
Batches section displays 14 import batch cards (failed status expected due to HotelRunner 401)
Audit timeline shows import audit logs with timestamps
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - existing batches from previous test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reservation Import Engine fully tested. Admin Control Panel now has 12 tabs including Reservations (2nd position). The Reservations tab has 5 sub-sections: Overview (4 metric cards + status breakdowns + recent batches), Reservations (table with filters), Review (manual review queue), Batches (import batch cards), Audit (timeline). Backend tests at test_reservation_import_engine.py (25 tests) and test_reservation_import_api.py (15 API tests). HotelRunner provider calls fail with 401 which is expected behavior since no real credentials configured.

backend_unit_tests.test_reservation_import_engine.py: 25/25 passed - covers fingerprint, models, enums, audit, service logic, alerting integration, reliability integration

backend_api_tests.GET /reservations/stats: WORKING - returns total_reservations, by_status, by_ack_status, review_queue_count, ack_failed_count, recent_batches, success_rate
backend_api_tests.GET /reservations/imported: WORKING - returns reservations list with count
backend_api_tests.GET /reservations/review-queue: WORKING - returns queue list with count
backend_api_tests.GET /reservations/batches: WORKING - returns batches list with count
backend_api_tests.GET /reservations/audit-trail: WORKING - returns audit_logs list with count
backend_api_tests.POST /reservations/retry-acks: WORKING - validates connector_id, returns 400 for missing connector
backend_api_tests.Authentication: WORKING - all endpoints require JWT auth

frontend_reservations_tab.Tab visible: YES - 2nd position in Admin Control Panel
frontend_reservations_tab.Overview section: WORKING - 4 metric cards (Total Imports, Success Rate, Review Queue, ACK Failed), Import Status Breakdown, ACK Status Breakdown, Recent Import Batches
frontend_reservations_tab.Reservations section: WORKING - table with columns: Guest, Channel, Status, ACK, Dates, Amount, Actions; status filter dropdown
frontend_reservations_tab.Review section: WORKING - shows 'No items pending review' empty state
frontend_reservations_tab.Batches section: WORKING - displays 14 import batch cards with status, counts, timestamps
frontend_reservations_tab.Audit section: WORKING - shows audit timeline with import-related events

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs. HotelRunner provider calls fail with 401 which is expected behavior without real credentials.
